# MixReflect

> Honest music feedback for your track: a room of five real, paid listeners react to your song, backed by an instant AI score out of 100. Paste a link, get heard. Free to start.

MixReflect gets your track genuinely heard. You paste a link to your song and a room of five real, paid listeners hears it end to end and reacts honestly — the kind of unbiased, human feedback artists actually want before they release. Alongside the human room, an instant AI read gives you a score out of 100, a verdict, and a breakdown so you have a fast, objective baseline while the real reactions land.

The product is built around two things, in this order: real human listeners first, AI score second. The AI is there to make feedback instant and measurable; the room of real people is the heart of it.

## How It Works

1. Paste a link to your track (or upload it) — no account needed to start
2. Get an instant AI read: a score out of 100, a verdict, a five-dimension breakdown, and three concrete fixes
3. Unlock the full report to send your track to the room — five real, paid listeners hear it end to end
4. Watch each honest reaction land on your report: real people, not bots and not playlist curators
5. Use the combined human reactions + AI read to decide if the track is ready to release

## What Makes It Different

- **Real, paid human listeners** — five people actually hear your track end to end and react. Not AI pretending to be people, not bots, not playlist curators looking to upsell placement.
- **Human feedback first, AI second** — the AI score is an instant baseline; the real room is the point.
- **Instant AI score out of 100** across five dimensions: hook, production, retention, emotional impact, and commercial pull.
- **Three concrete fixes** with every read — specific, actionable, not vague.
- **A measured waveform** — the AI read is grounded in your track's real frequency-split analysis, not guesswork.
- **No account needed to start** — paste a link and get your score.

## Pricing

- **First report — free (forever)**: your first track's complete report is free — the score out of 100, the full written read, all three fixes, and the measured waveform. No credit card required.
- **Unlock — $6.95 (one-time)**: opens a single track's full report — the complete breakdown plus every reaction from the room of five real listeners. Yours forever.
- **Unlimited — $19.95/month**: every track you submit is auto-unlocked, with unlimited full reports and the real-listener room each time. Cancel anytime.

There are no other paid tiers.

## Who It Is For

Music producers, beatmakers, singers, songwriters, and independent artists who want honest, structured feedback from real people before they release — plus a fast, objective AI score to back it up. Genre-agnostic: hip-hop, electronic, pop, indie, rock, R&B, and many more are all active.

## What It Is Not

- Not a playlist pitching service (unlike SubmitHub, Groover, or Playlist Push) — the listeners react honestly, they do not sell placement.
- Not AI-only feedback — real humans are part of every unlocked report.
- Not a peer-to-peer credit-swap — you do not have to review other people's tracks to get feedback on yours.
